trivia: The sweet spot of US regional flying: scope clauses in pilot contracts made the E175 the biggest jet regionals could operate, so hundreds fill American skies every day.
Post-2014 airframes wear big raked winglets that improve fuel burn and make the type easy to age at a glance.
funFacts: The default large regional jet of North America.
The E75L and E75S codes distinguish long and short wingtips.
